summary: Created `src/render/ruinModifiers.ts` with three ruin effects: fracture distortion (position/rotation offsets proportional to fracture severity), section collapse (Y-scale reduction at ruinLevel >= 0.5), and debris generation (up to 12 BoxGeometry pieces scaling linearly with ruinLevel). All effects use RUIN_THRESHOLD=0.15 to ensure fast/default states remain clean. Integrated into `buildCathedralGeometry.ts` via single `applyRuinModifiers()` call after base construction. Fixed lint/typecheck issues in pre-generated test files. All 345 unit tests pass, all 48 e2e tests pass, lint and typecheck clean.
